allow: Bash(python3 -c "import numpy as np; d = np.load\(''data/value_functions/phi_z.npz'', allow_pickle=True\); print\(''phi_z shape:'', d[''values''].shape\); print\(''phi_z grid_min:'', d[''grid_min'']\); print\(''phi_z grid_max:'', d[''grid_max'']\); print\(''phi_z <=0 fraction:'', \(d[''values'']<=0\).mean\(\)\); print\(\); d2 = np.load\(''data/value_functions/phi_h.npz'', allow_pickle=True\); print\(''phi_h shape:'', d2[''values''].shape\); print\(''phi_h <=0 fraction:'', \(d2[''values'']<=0\).mean\(\)\); print\(\); d3 = np.load\(''data/value_functions/B_z.npz'', allow_pickle=True\); print\(''B_z shape:'', d3[''values''].shape, ''nonzero frac:'', d3[''values''].mean\(\)\)")
